meta.homeTitle: Lubcon Oil Group — Lubricant Manufacturer & Exporter, UAE
meta.homeDescription: ISO-certified lubricant manufacturer in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE. Motor, diesel, industrial and marine oils, greases and base oils. Private label and white label for distributors worldwide.
meta.productsDescription: Full range of UAE-manufactured lubricants: motor oils, diesel engine oils, transmission and gear oils, hydraulic, marine, greases, coolants and base oils.
meta.manufacturingDescription: Inside our Ras Al Khaimah facility: blending, in-house laboratory, additive technology and export logistics under ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001.
meta.certificationsDescription: Verified ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 management systems with certificate numbers and accreditation details.
meta.privateLabelDescription: Launch your own lubricant brand from a UAE ISO-certified plant. Formulation, blending, filling, packaging and export in one partner.
meta.aboutDescription: The export and commercial division of an ISO-certified lubricant manufacturer in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE, supplying distributors across six regions.
meta.contactDescription: Request a quote, distributor terms or private-label proposal. WhatsApp, Telegram, phone and form — answered from Ras Al Khaimah, UAE.

hero.eyebrow: Lubricant manufacturer · Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
hero.cycleCaption: Your brand · Made in the UAE
hero.subhead: We blend and bottle premium-quality motor oils to your specification — your formula, your label, your packaging — at an ISO-certified plant in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE, ready to export worldwide.

c1.title: Technological flexibility
c1.desc: Your formulation, your packaging, your label.

c3.title: Global logistics
c3.desc: Free-zone export to six regions worldwide.

promo.title: Launch your own motor-oil brand
promo.text: Full private-label production from one ISO-certified UAE partner — your formula, your label, export-ready.

trust.title: Built for buyers who verify
trust.marquee: ISO 9001:2015 · ISO 14001:2015 · ISO 45001:2018 · API specifications · ACEA sequences · OEM-aligned formulations · UAF accredited · Ras Al Khaimah, UAE

products.title: A complete lubricant portfolio
products.subtitle: Formulated to international API, ACEA and OEM specifications, blended in the UAE and packed from 1 L to bulk.
products.tdsNote: Technical data sheets available on request.
products.ctaCardText: Send your specification — we match it to a formulation or develop one.

motor.name: Motor Oils
motor.desc: Synthetic and semi-synthetic passenger-car engine oils across modern viscosity grades.

diesel.name: Diesel Engine Oils
diesel.desc: Heavy-duty oils for commercial fleets, construction and power generation.

transmission.name: Transmission & Gear
transmission.desc: Automatic transmission fluids, manual and industrial gear oils, including ATF.

industrial.name: Industrial & Hydraulic
industrial.desc: Hydraulic, compressor and slideway oils to ISO VG grades for plant and machinery.

marine.name: Marine Lubricants
marine.desc: Trunk piston, system and cylinder oils for marine engines and shipping fleets.

greases.name: Greases
greases.desc: Lithium-complex, calcium-sulfonate and EP greases for automotive and industrial use.

coolants.name: Coolants, Brake Fluids & Base Oils
coolants.desc: Engine coolants, brake fluids and Group I–III base oils for blending partners.

manufacturing.title: From base oil to sealed pallet, under one roof
manufacturing.subtitle: An integrated facility in the Al Hamra Free Zone — blending, testing, filling and export logistics.

facility.title: Blending facility
facility.desc: Automated blending and high-speed filling lines for packs from 1 L to 208 L drums and bulk.

lab.title: In-house laboratory
lab.desc: Every batch tested for viscosity, flash point and key parameters before release.

additive.title: Additive technology
additive.desc: OEM-aligned additive systems and base-oil selection for stable, specification-grade performance.

logistics.title: Export logistics
logistics.desc: Free-zone location with documentation and shipping for sea and land freight worldwide.

manufacturing.ringCaption: Al Hamra Industrial Zone, Ras Al Khaimah
manufacturing.gallerySubtitle: Production hall and quality-control laboratory in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE.

quality.title: Protection engineered at nano scale
quality.p1: nanoSHIELD additive technology for lower friction and wear
quality.p3: Formulated to API, ACEA and OEM specifications

certifications.title: Independently certified management systems
certifications.subtitle: Issued to our group manufacturing entity and verifiable by certificate number — the way professional buyers expect.
certifications.scopeText: Manufacturing, blending and supply of lubricants and related products.
certifications.verifyText: Certificates are held by {factory}, the group manufacturing entity. Accredited by {body} ({note}) and verifiable at {verifyAt}. Lubcon Oil Group is its export and commercial division.

contact.title: Request a quote or distributor terms
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. Replies typically within one business day from Ras Al Khaimah.

form.name: Full name
form.successText: Thank you — our export desk will reply shortly. For an instant response, message us on WhatsApp.
form.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach us directly on WhatsApp.
form.consent: By submitting you agree to be contacted about your inquiry.

about.title: The export arm of a UAE lubricant manufacturer
about.lead: Lubcon Oil Group is the export and commercial division of {factory}, an ISO-certified lubricant plant in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates.
about.structureText: Manufacturing, quality systems and ISO certificates belong to the group factory. Lubcon Oil Group handles export, distribution partnerships and private-label programs. We state this relationship openly — the certificates carry the manufacturing entity's name and numbers.
about.whoText: Distributors, fleet operators, industrial buyers and brand owners who need reliable, specification-grade lubricants and a partner that can private-label and export at scale.
about.whyText: A free-zone industrial base on the Arabian Gulf gives efficient sea and land logistics, simplified export documentation and fast reach into both Eastern and Western markets.

footer.relationship: Lubcon Oil Group is the export division of {factory}.
